name: ecu-test-api
description: Codex skills for ecu.test API work and ecutest_code automation with bundled references.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for ecu.test APIs and ecutest_code Python automation.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local plugin that packages the existing ecu.test API skills and the ecutest_code automation skill as separate, routeable Codex skills. Each skill keeps its own bundled references and task-specific guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use ecu.test Object API to inspect a package.
Write an ecutest_code pytest automation case.
Find the correct ecu.test Report API object model.
